title: Torrezx-Bogged bow
description: change the bow for a bogged themed mossy bow
body:
Torrezx-Bogged bow

ESPAÑOL-Nuevo arco tematizado en el nuevo mob Bogged,ahora tendra mas sentido

y ira bien con el mob,cambia el arco normal.

ENGLISH-New themed arc in the new Bogged mob, now it will make more sense

and it will go well with the mob, change the normal bow.

1.21.11x-1.21.5-Rename in anvil/Renombra en un yunque:


-Bogged bow  (Bow)


1.21.4x-.1.20.2 Replace bow
